body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Partly address Issue #1038 
- Use cosine (zenith angle) instead of zenith angle so streamline with atmos
- update the diffuse fraction in `update_drivers`, store in p.drivers,  rather than storing in canopy aux and updating in canopy functions.
- remove access of atmos.h in Canopy update aux

## To-do
title: Update the diffuse fraction in drivers; use cosine of zenith angle; unneeded h access
